ab: yakay ku papalrali ki bulru sya Liucu, laka takarimirimurane ku lamanemaneini
ch: 我有一個同學叫Liucu，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Liucu, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: lukibulrubulru, lakisalru ki papalraini ku sapacapacasane, sasakisakidrane ka gumu si cuming.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: sanguvale sangupusale sangutulrulu, la pakisalru iniane ku lamanemane makanaelre.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ai yakay ku malisi ku kakudhaneini, kiasalru lakai saulriulri.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: ikay kadadalranane la apimulricungu, ai lakarimuru ku sasakisakidrane ku senate.
ch: 路途中，Liucu想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Liucu wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: lakisalru ki papalraini ki bulru ku sasakisakidrane ku senate., ai makituamiakay tubalre makanaelre, kainaku wailuku.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: lagelrethe kwi Liucu, lakalisi iyakay, anukai pakisalru nakwane makanaelre ku sasakisakidrane ku senate!
ch: Liucu急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Liucu burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: latubalre ku papalraini ki bulru, iyakay anikamani yai kaisu ngiailuku si lupakisalrwane muswane ku lamanemane lakaisu saulriulri!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: sakakaiyane samugaku langulalakese mugaku kwi Liucu, ku kisalruini ki papalraini ki bulru lasaulri liniane patulre ku lamanemane.
ch: 隔天上學，Liucu很早就到學校了，Liucu把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Liucu arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: lakaiseasene ki papalraini ki bulru kwi Liucu, si iyakay lringiailukunganaku ku lamanemaneli, ku syaswalane taubangalranenumi pakisalru nakawane maelanenga.
ch: Liucu向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Liucu apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
